options: A family of strict checks (noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, etc.)
questions.explanation: Turn it on. Fight-of-the-year against subtle bugs.

options: Matches how Vite/webpack/Next resolve — supports package.json 'exports' etc.
arr[i] is T | undefined — safer, more accurate
questions.explanation: Sane default. Force explicit undefined handling.

options: target = JS syntax level emitted; lib = which built-in APIs are typed
questions.explanation: Set both — you can target ES2022 syntax but include the DOM lib.
